appraisal_events.evidence: « Le marquis se leva avec cette vulgarité méprisante des gens bien nés… ‘Quel est ce Monsieur qui joue aux cartes ? qu’est-ce qu’il fait dans la vie ? qu’est-ce qu’il vend ?’ »; « Ce nom, murmuré d’un air modeste, trompa marquis de Cambremer. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator highlights the classist coarseness and ignorance of the marquis, then his embarrassment at having been deceived by Mr. Verdurin's feigned modesty, which lowers his image in the scene.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally diminished by the narratorial irony in the description of his vulgarity and his mistake.
